entity.summary: Swiss-origin centralized exchange founded in 2015 that suffered a roughly $22 million security breach in June 2024, halted trading, and entered bankruptcy after the Zug Cantonal Court opened proceedings against Lykke Corp on December 16, 2024.
entity.notes: The terminal classification is dead / insolvency. The June 2024 breach was the operational trigger, but the conservative death marker uses the court-recorded bankruptcy opening on 2024-12-16 rather than relying on customer-email reports of an earlier December service cutoff.

expected.summary: Switzerland-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the Lykke Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Swiss-origin centralized exchange founded in 2015 that suffered a roughly $22 million security breach in June 2024, halted trading, and entered bankruptcy after the Zug Cantonal Court opened proceedings against Lykke Corp on December 16, 2024.
changes.notes: The terminal classification is dead / insolvency. The June 2024 breach was the operational trigger, but the conservative death marker uses the court-recorded bankruptcy opening on 2024-12-16 rather than relying on customer-email reports of an earlier December service cutoff.

events.title: Lykke Exchange suffered a major security breach
events.description: Lykke Exchange suffered unauthorized access on June 4, 2024 that resulted in approximately $22 million of digital assets being removed from the platform.
events.notes: The loss amount is approximate and varies slightly across coverage.

events.title: Lykke halted trading after the breach
events.description: Lykke shut down trading two days after the June 4 security incident while investigating unauthorized access and asset losses.

events.title: Bankruptcy proceedings opened against Lykke Corp
events.description: The Zug Cantonal Court opened bankruptcy proceedings against Lykke Corp on December 16, 2024, dissolving the company into liquidation.
events.notes: This court-recorded date is used as the conservative terminal marker for the exchange record.

evidence.title: Lykke crypto exchange acknowledges hack after halting withdrawals
evidence.notes: Reports Lykke's acknowledgement that the exploit occurred on June 4 and withdrawals were halted.

evidence.title: UK crypto exchange stops trading after $22m is lost in security incident
evidence.notes: Reports the June 4 breach and estimated loss.

evidence.title: UK crypto exchange stops trading after $22m is lost in security incident
evidence.notes: Reports that trading was stopped on June 6 after unauthorized access.

evidence.title: Lykke Corp in liquidation commercial-register history
evidence.publisher: Moneyhouse / Swiss Official Gazette of Commerce data
evidence.notes: Reproduces the Zug commercial-register notice stating that bankruptcy was opened on December 16, 2024 and the company was dissolved.
